config.scxml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<scxml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/07/scxml" xmlns:editor="http://vscxml.com/editor" version="1.0" datamodel="ecmascript" initial="operational" name="HamiltonSTAR_PipChannel">
  <datamodel>
    <data id="tip_pattern" expr="0"/>
    <data id="tip_type" expr="-1"/>
    <data id="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
    <data id="pos_x" expr="0"/>
    <data id="pos_y" expr="0"/>
    <data id="pos_z" expr="0"/>
    <data id="last_lld_01mm" expr="0"/>
    <data id="last_error" expr="0"/>
  </datamodel>
  <state id="operational" initial="not_initialized" editor:x="12" editor:y="12" editor:width="1862" editor:height="697" editor:label="operational" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="0">
    <state id="not_initialized" editor:x="1607" editor:y="592" editor:width="225" editor:height="75" editor:label="not_initialized" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="1">
      <transition target="no_tip" event="C0DI" editor:waypoints="42,654;42,542;993,542;993,446" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHASC7X6T8NBMMAV54ZT">
        <assign location="tip_pattern" expr="0"/>
        <assign location="tip_type" expr="-1"/>
        <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
        <log expr="'Initialize PIP channels'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="idle" initial="no_tip" editor:x="80" editor:y="122" editor:width="1096" editor:height="458" editor:label="idle" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="2">
      <transition target="moving" event="C0JM" editor:waypoints="1238,446;1238,511" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHAS4QH5NF1FGRR6VZ1N">
        <assign location="pos_x" expr="_event.data.xp"/>
        <assign location="pos_y" expr="_event.data.yp"/>
        <assign location="pos_z" expr="_event.data.zp"/>
        <log expr="'Move to X=' + _event.data.xp" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="idle" event="C0ZA" editor:waypoints="1206,320;1206,112;50,112;50,550" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHASKJG5QCX1WMEQDQEQ">
        <assign location="pos_z" expr="0"/>
        <log expr="'Z-safety'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <state id="no_tip" editor:x="916" editor:y="252" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="no_tip" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="3">
        <transition target="tip_empty" event="C0TP" editor:waypoints="973,431;973,526;122,526;122,448;137,448.02;640,448.02;640,434.02" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHAS0XYCNGTMPERY967X">
          <assign location="tip_pattern" expr="_event.data.tm"/>
          <assign location="tip_type" expr="_event.data.tt"/>
          <log expr="'Tip pick-up type=' + _event.data.tt" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="error" event="C0AS" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHASR7JH13T7N9A7JA1J">
          <assign location="last_error" expr="8"/>
        </transition>
        <transition target="error" event="C0DS" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHAS0EDVEY5XZEZP0B4B">
          <assign location="last_error" expr="8"/>
        </transition>
      </state>
      <state id="tip_fitted" initial="tip_empty" editor:x="50" editor:y="45" editor:width="718" editor:height="300.02" editor:label="tip_fitted" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="4">
        <transition target="washing" event="C0LW" editor:waypoints="1218,342;1218,336" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHATXCACD2S4G3XW69WH">
          <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
          <log expr="'DC Wash'" label="FW"/>
        </transition>
        <state id="tip_empty" editor:x="513" editor:y="195.02" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="tip_empty" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="5">
          <onentry>
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
          </onentry>
          <transition target="tip_loaded" event="C0AS" editor:waypoints="620,404.02;620,400.02" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHATKWGSX3SA64R80GGK">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="_event.data.av"/>
            <assign location="pos_x" expr="_event.data.xp || pos_x"/>
            <log expr="'Aspirate vol=' + _event.data.av + ' (0.1ul)'" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="no_tip" event="C0TR" editor:waypoints="865,412;880,412;880,416" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHATQ2GFX118P4YWCWYY">
            <assign location="tip_pattern" expr="0"/>
            <assign location="tip_type" expr="-1"/>
            <log expr="'Tip eject'" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
        </state>
        <state id="tip_loaded" editor:x="112.5" editor:y="165.02" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="tip_loaded" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="6">
          <transition target="tip_loaded" event="C0DS" cond="_event.data.dm == 4" editor:waypoints="190.27777777777777,155.02;209.72222222222223,155.02" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHAT8PVWEW4DERSAK0SN">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
            <log expr="'Dispense empty-tip'" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="tip_loaded" event="C0DS" cond="_event.data.dm == 2 || _event.data.dm == 3" editor:waypoints="170.83333333333331,125.02000000000001;229.16666666666666,125.02000000000001" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHATYN562FGHB5VMBCRB">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="Math.max(0, volume_held_01ul - _event.data.dv)"/>
            <log expr="'Dispense surface partial vol=' + _event.data.dv" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="tip_empty" event="C0DS" editor:waypoints="527,382.02;527,389.02" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHAT54BX9GPCNTAHK5PV">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="Math.max(0, volume_held_01ul - _event.data.dv)"/>
            <log expr="'Dispense jet vol=' + _event.data.dv" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="tip_loaded" event="C0AS" editor:waypoints="151.38888888888889,95.02000000000001;248.6111111111111,95.02000000000001" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHATAEDE586MWCXN11P2">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="volume_held_01ul + _event.data.av"/>
            <log expr="'Sequential aspirate +' + _event.data.av" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="tip_loaded" event="C0DF" editor:waypoints="131.94444444444446,65.02000000000001;268.05555555555554,65.02000000000001" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHATAR37TDQHX52SA5M3">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="Math.max(0, volume_held_01ul - (_event.data.dv * _event.data.xi))"/>
            <log expr="'Dispense-on-fly ' + _event.data.xi + ' shoots'" label="FW"/>
          </transition>
          <transition target="no_tip" event="C0TR" editor:waypoints="527,363.02;527,352.02;865,352;880,352;880,401" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHATSD5GN3MXYYP0QR17">
            <assign location="volume_held_01ul" expr="0"/>
            <assign location="tip_pattern" expr="0"/>
            <assign location="tip_type" expr="-1"/>
            <log expr="'Tip eject with liquid held'" label="FW_WARN"/>
          </transition>
        </state>
      </state>
    </state>
    <state id="moving" editor:x="1334" editor:y="474" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="moving" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="7">
      <transition target="idle" event="move.done" editor:waypoints="1311,536;1311,638;52,638;52,552" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHAT5RV0J1H8HK5H4FKA"/>
    </state>
    <state id="washing" editor:x="1334" editor:y="274" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="washing" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="8">
      <transition target="tip_empty" event="wash.done" editor:waypoints="1228,311;1228,78;52,78;52,437;137,437.02;630,437.02;630,419.02" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHAT9W6ARJ788K40Z178"/>
    </state>
    <state id="error" editor:x="1334" editor:y="374" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="error" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="9">
      <onentry>
        <log expr="'PIP error ' + last_error" label="ERROR"/>
      </onentry>
      <transition target="not_initialized" event="C0DI" editor:waypoints="1604,424;1604,629" editor:id="t_01KP3PKHAT5BG17F180CVCE7CJ">
        <assign location="last_error" expr="0"/>
        <log expr="'Re-init after error'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
  </state>
</scxml>
